title: command open chrome
notes: Open Google Chrome and create a window when Chrome has none.

title: command open ghostty terminal
notes: Open Ghostty with the source-Mac command title used for Raycast search/hotkeys.

title: command open terminal
notes: Open Ghostty as the public terminal app.

title: switch input source to cn
notes: Switch to the configured Chinese input source through the system shortcut.

title: Insert Current Date
notes: Type the current date as YYYY-MM-DD.

title: Insert Current DateTime
notes: Type the current date and time as YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.
